articles.author: ritika gondhalekar
articles.title: Mumbai to get first Disaster Management Ward at Nair Hospital
articles.description: Mumbai's Nair Hospital is set to establish the city's first dedicated Disaster Management Ward to provide specialised treatment during mass casualty incidents such as building collapses, train accidents, fires and other major emergencies. The facility is expected to become operational within the next six months.

articles.author: ani
articles.title: Monsoon: Intense deluge anchors East while heatwaves scorch South India
articles.description: IMD warns of extremely heavy rainfall in Meghalaya and Bengal, while coastal Andhra Pradesh and Tamil Nadu face hot and humid conditions.

articles.author: ht correspondent
articles.title: Haryana BJP launches cleanliness drive ahead of PM’s visit
articles.description: Gupta said that the campaign aims to increase awareness among citizens about cleanliness, encourage public participation in keeping public places clean and beautiful, and strengthen the sense of collective responsibility towards environmental protection

articles.author: bikash singh
articles.title: Northeast reels under rain fury: Arunachal floods claim 7 lives, Mizoram evacuates hundreds, Guwahati grinds to halt
articles.description: Incessant rains have triggered severe floods and landslides across Arunachal Pradesh, impacting many districts. Mizoram's government has advised tourists to postpone visits due to safety concerns. Heavy rainfall caused significant waterlogging and traffic congestion in Guwahati, Assam. Hundreds of vehicles were stranded, and landslides further disrupted transportation routes. Authorities are urging residents to remain vigilant and take necessary precautions.

articles.author: neeraj mohan
articles.title: Haryana cracks whip on 22 polluting stone crushers
articles.description: The action, initiated on the directions of the National Green Tribunal (NGT), comes after repeated recovery notices failed to elicit compliance from the defaulting units

articles.author: narendra chaudhary
articles.title: Concerns Rise Over Leafy Greens Amid Cyclospora Outbreak in the U.S.
articles.description: A recent outbreak of cyclospora infections in the U.S. has raised alarms about the safety of leafy greens, particularly lettuce. With nearly 3,000 reported cases and 86 hospitalizations, health officials are investigating the source of the outbreak. Symptoms include severe diarrhea, stomach cramps, and nausea. Residents are advised to avoid prepackaged salads and practice safe food handling. Treatment is available, but prevention is key. Stay informed about the latest health updates and take necessary precautions to protect yourself.

articles.author: ani
articles.title: India News | Monsoon: Intense Deluge Anchors East While Heatwaves Scorch South India
articles.description: Get latest articles and stories on India at LatestLY. The national weather narrative has split cleanly down the middle, presenting a dual-threat scenario: a relentless, soaking monsoon siege in the East and Northeast, running parallel to a punishing, humid heatwave gripping the southeastern coast.

articles.title: Shriya and Mom Supriya Pilgaonkar plant 1,500 saplings to create a mini-forest for birds
articles.description: Actress Shriya Pilgaonkar shared a glimpse of a heartwarming green initiative undertaken with her mother, veteran actress Supriya Pilgaonkar.
